name: stratafy-genesis
description: Compose a complete Stratafy workspace from a seed idea — synchronous parallel multi-expert standup (CMO/CTO/FD/GC/CHRO), reconciliation, and write-through to a live workspace in under 15 minutes. Ships tool-restricted sub-agent definitions under agents/ so parallel expert dispatch does not inherit the Stratafy MCP tool surface and stays under input-token limits.
